title: DDB Roll Cards
description: Companion for D&D Beyond Sync: rides ddb-sync's existing game-log connection and renders EVERY roll (including the 'deferred' ability checks/saves ddb-sync ignores, and attacks it fails to render) as clean chat cards — a GM-only battle readout with hit/AC, apply damage/heal/temp, saves, conditions & reactions, plus a public result for players. No second connection, no MidiQOL dependency.
